files.patch:
@@ -364,0 +364,6 @@
+    /**
+     * Flag that indicates that a var symbol represent a type class witness.
+     */
+    @Use({FlagTarget.VARIABLE})
+    public static final long WITNESS = 1L<<47;
+

@@ -3173,0 +3173,41 @@
+# 0: type
+compiler.err.cant.resolve.witness=\
+    cannot find witness\n\
+    type: {0}
+
+# 0: type, 1: message segment
+compiler.err.bad.witness.decl=\
+    invalid type {0} in witness declaration\n\
+    ({1})
+
+compiler.misc.unsupported.wildcards=\
+    Top-level wildcards not supported in witness declaration
+
+compiler.misc.type.var.in.witness=\
+    Type-variables not supported in witness lookup
+
+compiler.misc.witness.must.be.generic.interface=\
+    Witness type must be a generic interface
+
+# 0: set of flag or string
+compiler.misc.witness.inaccessible=\
+    Witness declaration has weaker access privileges; expected {0}
+
+# 0: type
+compiler.misc.witness.must.refer.to.site=\
+    Witness type must refer to enclosing type {0}
+
+# 0: type, 1: message segment
+compiler.err.bad.witness.lookup.type=\
+    Bad witness lookup type {0}\n\
+    ({1})
+
+# 0: symbol, 1: symbol, 2: message segment
+compiler.err.witness.clash=\
+    Witness {0} clashes with {1}\n\
+    ({2})
+
+# 0: type
+compiler.misc.witness.clash.same.type=\
+    Witnesses have the same type {0}
+
@@ -3215,0 +3256,3 @@
+compiler.misc.kindname.witness=\
+    witness
+
